testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.security.UpgradeUrlValidationTest

testcase.name: rejects URL that looks like slogr domain but is subdomain attack()
rejects checksum that is only the prefix()
rejects URL where slogr-io appears in path but not host()

testsuite.system-out: 09:46:07.730 [Test worker @coroutine#6] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must start with 'sha256:' 09:46:07.744 [Test worker @coroutine#7] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.758 [Test worker @coroutine#8] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.772 [Test worker @coroutine#9] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.794 [Test worker @coroutine#10] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.811 [Test worker @coroutine#11] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: missing checksum 09:46:07.827 [Test worker @coroutine#12] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: missing download_url 09:46:07.843 [Test worker @coroutine#13] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade rejected: URL not on releases.slogr.io — https://evil.example.com/agent.jar 09:46:07.845 [Test worker @coroutine#13] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must be on releases.slogr.io 09:46:07.863 [Test worker @coroutine#14] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade rejected: URL not on releases.slogr.io — https://attacker.com/releases.slogr.io/agent.jar 09:46:07.863 [Test worker @coroutine#14] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must be on releases.slogr.io 09:46:07.880 [Test worker @coroutine#15] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must be sha256:<64 lowercase hex chars> 09:46:07.898 [Test worker @coroutine#16] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade rejected: URL not on releases.slogr.io — https://evil.com/releases.slogr.io/agent.jar 09:46:07.898 [Test worker @coroutine#16] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must be on releases.slogr.io
